# Angular Map Photo Uploader - Copilot Instructions

This is a modern Angular application that displays uploaded photos on a map based on their GPS coordinates (EXIF metadata).

## Project Setup

- Angular 18+
- Angular Material for UI
- Google Maps integration
- EXIF metadata extraction from images
- TypeScript

## Key Features

- Upload photos with GPS metadata
- Display pins on map based on photo coordinates
- Click pins to view photos and metadata
- Google-like card interface design
- Responsive and modern UI

## Development Commands

- `ng serve` - Start development server
- `ng build` - Build for production
- `ng test` - Run tests

## File Structure

- `src/app/` - Application components and services
- `src/app/components/map/` - Map component
- `src/app/components/upload/` - Upload component
- `src/app/services/` - Application services
